# Jun 10 2008 at 6:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759616614
Scholar
44 posts
Per EQ Traders:
This item can be Vendor Purchased:

* Abysmal Sea
o Glirina Morningbloom @ -142, 228, 98, in the hold
o Rilwind Sitnai @ -163, 200, 98
* Ak'Anon
o a clockwork jeweler @ 1348, -884, -28, in bank
* Cabilis East
o Klok Ixmid @ 659, 156, 6
* Crescent Reach
o Jeweler Nailah @ -1247, -1648, 33, upstairs in The Jeweled Serpent
* East Freeport
o Ennuard Yetaius @ 692, -530, -10, in Arena building
o Ilenarn Ghaeaus @ 653, -527, -10, in Arena building
* Echo Caverns
o Solsain Paslinor @ 1324, -544, -78
* Firiona Vie
o Drake Mountainstorm @ 896, -3335, 159
* Grobb
o Rezslog @ 455, -179, -2, Outside Krungs Clubs & Junk
o Uzak @ 563, -319, -2
* Gukta (in Rathe Mnts)
o Zok Prolo @ -1900, -189, 2
* High Keep
o Merchant Edina @ -97, -294, 5, Upstairs from the bank
* Icewell Keep
o Coldain Outcast @ 52, 928, -21
* Kelethin (in Greater Faydark)
o Merchant Laedar @ 617, 542, 163, EQAtlas platform #5
* Neriak - 3rd Gate
o Telnor D`Unnar @ 807, -1419, -78, In The Bauble
* Neriak - Commons
o Nekola N`Ryt @ 81, -931, -24, Inside Forge House
* North Kaladim
o Banaf Norkhitter @ 699, 426, -63, in the mine
* North Qeynos
o Svena Ironforge @ 60, 34, 3, inside The Jewelbox
* Northern Felwithe
o Merchant Tyslin @ 107, -439, 19, Upstairs, Shop of All Holos
* Overthere
o Tin Merchant IV @ 2647, 2525, -48
* Plane of Knowledge
o Kirem Deepfacet @ 423, 769, -92, Northern trader building
* Rathe Mountains (see also Gukta)
o Darfumpel Zirubbel @ 4093, 896, 4, Inn in northwestern section
* Relic, the Artifact City
o Goroth @ 933, 377, -274
* Shadow Haven
o Adinson Allonode @ -12, 631, -44
o Pilop Stolarix @ -716, 1576, -62, Inside small stone hut near House of Stout bank
o Eriska Malosona @ 1175, 44, -46, upstairs in library area
* Shar Vahl
o Uhlma Mareesh @ 216, -371, -187, Inside middle northern building in Merchant's Quarter (bags, barrels, and boxes on sign)
* Southern Felwithe
o Merchant Tyslin @ 450, -775, -2, inside merchant building
* Steamfont Mountains
o Torodrane Frompwaddle @ -1602, -1841, -109, At the southeastern Observatory
* Thurgadin
o Meg Tucter @ -350, -54, 3, Inside jewelry shop
* West Freeport
o Jade @ -159, -1319, -137
o Aimie Moonspin @ 436, -696, -87
▲ Page top
vendor?
QuoteReply
# May 19 2008 at 11:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785438283
69 posts
Pretty sure there isn't one. I got decent drop rates in Dranik Scar. Depending on your level pretty easy to farm. I was killing Noc's, Kyv's for faction and got several off of these. So there's more mobs in Dranik's than listed. Unfortunately I don't remember for sure exactly what mobs they were. I know it was the Noc's or Kyv's, as I was killing those for faction.
▲ Page top
More in Jaggedpine Forest
QuoteReply
# Dec 14 2004 at 1:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1606090783103
242 posts
"Opal" was retrieved from the still flickering corpse of a willowisp in Jaggedpine Forest. The Wisp also dropped Words of Convocation and a Greater Lightstone.

[BlueBlue[/BlueViolet
